mapper.sql: id, reqno,data_date, clinical_notes, data_json, filter_data_json, struct_data_json, event_json, create_time, last_time
mapper.select: select top 1 last_time from item_time_set order by last_time desc

SELECT reqno, pathosid, sex, age + ageunit AS age, d1.data_name AS disname, CASE WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), outhodate, 120) = '9999-12-31' THEN '在院' ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), outhodate, 120) END AS outhodate, inhosdate AS inhosday, d2.data_name AS inhosdistrict, DATEDIFF(DAY, inhosdate, CASE WHEN outhodate = '9999-12-31' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE outhodate END) AS hosdays FROM pat_infor pat LEFT JOIN district_dict d1 ON pat.currentdist = d1.datano LEFT JOIN district_dict d2 ON pat.inhosdict = d2.datano LEFT JOIN district_custom d3 ON pat.currentdept = d3.datano WHERE 1 = 1 AND pat.reqno = #{reqno} and ( coalesce('0','0')='0' or (coalesce('0','0')='1' and (coalesce(d1.depcss,'_')='本院' or coalesce('本院','_')='_'))
)

SELECT reqno, indeptdate AS indeptdate, --入科时间 indeptname AS indeptname, --入科科室 CASE WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), outdeptdate, 120) = '9999-12-31' THEN '在院' ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), outdeptdate, 23) END AS outhodate, --出科时间 outdeptname FROM PatDeptChange p WHERE reqno = #{reqno}
and lasttime > #{lastTime}
